summary: The diff shows modifications to TraveloguePanel.tsx (World Travel popup), WebsiteLayoutPanel.tsx (Global Control popup), and LocationMapExplorer.tsx (which contains the Time Zone dialog). All three popups appear to have received layout revisions with improved internal structure, section groupings, spacing, separators/dividers, and reduced sizing. The changes appear to address all three requirements with distinct layouts tailored to each popup's content.
